title: Edit README to Add Author Section
description: Update the project's README file to include an 'Author' section with the relevant author information.
details: Open the README.md file located at the root of the project. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical place, such as after the project description or before the license). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to a profile (e.g., GitHub, email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices. Save the changes.
test_strategy: Visually inspect the updated README.md file in a Markdown viewer or on GitHub to confirm the 'Author' section appears correctly, is formatted consistently, and contains accurate information.
